openQuestions.text: Where does residual completion-state drift remain (graph-metadata.json status vs spec.md/implementation-summary.md narrative) across ALL tracks?
What numbering drift persists in tracks NOT covered by phases 001-005?
How widespread are naming-convention violations relative to sk-doc/017+032 hyphen-case program?
What prior context-optimization efforts are documented across packets and what precedents do they set for phase 007?
What structural artifacts stray from packet conventions (stray root descriptions.json, z_archive status, phase-parent drift)?

resolvedQuestions.text: Numbering drift is a dual-scheme inconsistency (local per-track counters vs global-offset ranges) plus uncompacted gaps in global-offset tracks (sk-code, sk-git, system-deep-loop); cross-track collisions are namespaced, not drift.

61 snake_case dirs in 4 clusters (z_archive×11, z_future×9, sk-doc/013 scratch/fixtures ~30, misc); 032 kebab program unenforced (planned); convention flip-flopped 027↔032; primary numbered slugs clean.

6 context-optimization mechanisms documented (compaction, memory-continuity substrate, lean-root retrieval opt, deprecation-driven pruning, continuity dedup, context-budgeting); cyclical build→compact→archive→refine lifecycle; deprecation-pruning is direct precedent for phase 007.

Status drift systemic (~45 raw/~23 semantic mismatches). Splits into (a) intentional draft-pending-verification (sk-design family: work shipped but packets held at draft by design) and (b) genuine drift: spec.md over-states complete/blocked while graph says in_progress/planned with no draft caveat (dominant actionable pattern).

Structural artifacts mostly intended design: root descriptions.json is a generated aggregate index; changelog/ is a deliberate phase-parent namespace; only genuine signals are z_archive=planned (7/8) status gap and 999/changelog convention deviations.

keyFindings.text: Completion-state drift systemic: 45 raw / ~23 semantic spec-vs-graph status mismatches across 121 packets (~37% raw). Dominant: spec claims complete while graph says in_progress/planned.
Two numbering schemes coexist (local per-track vs global-offset); phases 001-005 did not unify the tree.
Kebab-case program (sk-doc/032) is unenforced (planned); 61 snake_case dirs in 4 clusters; convention flip-flopped 027↔032.
6 context-optimization mechanisms documented; cyclical lifecycle; deprecation-pruning precedes phase 007.
sk-design phase 005 work shipped but packets held at draft BY DESIGN (reconstruction drafts pending verification) — intentional status-semantics mismatch, not a defect.
Parent 000 causal_summary documents root cause: untracked stub/duplicate dirs from partial migrations (system-speckit 002/003/004/007 shadowed by 0-file copies at 026-029).
Structural artifacts mostly intended design (descriptions.json=generated index; changelog=phase-parent); genuine anomaly only z_archive=planned (7/8).

ruledOutDirections.approach: Cross-track number collision as a drift category
ruledOutDirections.reason: Track path prefix disambiguates identical numbers; not a real collision

ruledOutDirections.approach: Primary numbered packets have snake_case slugs
ruledOutDirections.reason: Numbered slugs are clean kebab-case; deviations confined to z_archive/z_future/changelog/scratch
Most are research-iteration summarize noise; real efforts are ~6 mechanisms across ~10 packets
It is a generated aggregate index {version,generated,folders}
